The object of considering the Ascendant is limited to know
the exact time, minutes and seconds of the native's birth and the
planetary positions at the particular time of native's birth, in signs,

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 15
degrees, minutes and seconds. In the Nadi system, signs, degrees,
minutes, and seconds of planets positions are extremely important
for predicitions. The 12 bhavas are divided amongst the 9 planets.
Whether it is Nadi system or any other system, signs, degrees,
minutes and seconds showing the motions of the planets and their
causitivity are very important.
Given below is the Table ofKarakatvas of various Planets.

l.Sun Father, Son, Government, Soul, Right Eye, king,
Minister, Glow, Status, Eminent-person.
2. Moon Mind, Mother, Mother-in-law Kum-kum (Red
powder). Cold. Cough, Water, Cheater, Changes,
Lady. Female. Left Eye, Godess Parvathi.
